requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Requirements — Space Heaters (Regulation (EU) 2016/2281) and ENEA Building Energy Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计要求——供暖设备（欧盟法规2016/2281）与ENEA建筑能效规定
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計要求——供暖設備（歐盟法規2016/2281）與ENEA建築能效規定

summary.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (implementing Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC) sets minimum seasonal space heating energy efficiency (ηs) thresholds for air heating products including heat pumps. For heat pumps, efficiency is expressed via SCOP (seasonal coefficient of performance); testing at rated conditions uses EN 14511; seasonal performance calculation uses EN 14825. Italy additionally requires compliance with national building-energy performance rules (D.Lgs. 192/2005 and associated Ministerial Decrees, supervised by ENEA — Agenzia Nazionale per le nuove tecnologie, l'energia e lo sviluppo economico sostenibile) for new buildings and renovations. ENEA administers the Conto Termico 2.0 and Ecobonus schemes which set minimum SCOP thresholds for incentive eligibility, often higher than the Ecodesign mandatory floor.
summary.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（实施生态设计指令2009/125/EC）为包括热泵在内的供暖产品设定了最低季节性空间供暖能效（ηs）门槛。对于热泵，效率通过SCOP（季节性性能系数）表示；额定工况测试依据EN 14511；季节性性能计算依据EN 14825。意大利还要求新建建筑和改造项目额外遵守国家建筑能效规定（D.Lgs. 192/2005及相关部长令，由ENEA——新技术、能源与可持续经济发展国家机构监督）。ENEA管理Conto Termico 2.0和Ecobonus方案，这两个方案设定了激励资格所需的最低SCOP门槛，通常高于生态设计法规强制要求的最低值。
summary.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（實施生態設計指令2009/125/EC）為包括熱泵在內的供暖產品設定了最低季節性空間供暖能效（ηs）門檻。對於熱泵，效率通過SCOP（季節性性能係數）表示；額定工況測試依據EN 14511；季節性性能計算依據EN 14825。義大利還要求新建建築和改造項目額外遵守國家建築能效規定（D.Lgs. 192/2005及相關部長令，由ENEA——新技術、能源與可持續經濟發展國家機構監督）。ENEA管理Conto Termico 2.0和Ecobonus方案，這兩個方案設定了激勵資格所需的最低SCOP門檻，通常高於生態設計法規強制要求的最低值。

standards_or_laws: ENEA (energy agency — building energy and Conto Termico / Ecobonus)

summary.en: GB 21455-2019 is the mandatory energy efficiency standard for room air conditioners and multi-split systems, specifying COP at rated conditions. For dedicated space-heating heat pumps, GB/T 25127-2010 series covers low-ambient heating performance. Neither standard employs the SCOP methodology used in EU Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281, and seasonal efficiency calculation methods are not equivalent. China has no incentive scheme equivalent to Italian Conto Termico or Ecobonus with SCOP-based eligibility thresholds.
summary.zh: GB 21455-2019是房间空调器和多联机的强制性能效标准，规定额定工况下的COP。针对专用空间供暖热泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵盖低环境温度制热性能。这两项标准均未采用欧盟生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281所用的SCOP方法，季节性效率计算方法不等效。中国没有与意大利Conto Termico或Ecobonus（基于SCOP资格门槛）等效的激励方案。
summary.zht: GB 21455-2019是房間空調器和多聯機的強制性能效標準，規定額定工況下的COP。針對專用空間供暖熱泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵蓋低環境溫度制熱性能。這兩項標準均未採用歐盟生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281所用的SCOP方法，季節性效率計算方法不等效。中國沒有與義大利Conto Termico或Ecobonus（基於SCOP資格門檻）等效的激勵方案。

gap.en: No SCOP methodology equivalent in Chinese standards. Chinese efficiency test data (COP at rated condition) cannot be directly used to demonstrate compliance with EU Ecodesign (EU) 2016/2281 ηs thresholds applicable in Italy. Full re-testing to EN 14511 and seasonal performance calculation to EN 14825 is required. For Conto Termico 2.0 or Ecobonus eligibility in Italy, ENEA-specified minimum SCOP values (typically higher than the Ecodesign mandatory floor) must also be met and documented.
gap.zh: 中国标准中没有等效的SCOP方法。中国效率测试数据（额定工况COP）不能直接用于证明符合意大利适用的欧盟生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281 ηs门槛。需按EN 14511重新进行全面测试，并按EN 14825计算季节性性能。如需在意大利申请Conto Termico 2.0或Ecobonus激励，还须满足并记录ENEA规定的最低SCOP值（通常高于生态设计强制最低值）。
gap.zht: 中國標準中沒有等效的SCOP方法。中國效率測試數據（額定工況COP）不能直接用於證明符合義大利適用的歐盟生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281 ηs門檻。需按EN 14511重新進行全面測試，並按EN 14825計算季節性性能。如需在義大利申請Conto Termico 2.0或Ecobonus激勵，還須滿足並記錄ENEA規定的最低SCOP值（通常高於生態設計強制最低值）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 applies in Italy; D.Lgs. 192/2005 building energy rules mandatory for new builds/renovations; Conto Termico/Ecobonus SCOP thresholds mandatory for incentive eligibility)

source.publisher: ENEA — Agenzia Nazionale per le nuove tecnologie, l'energia e lo sviluppo economico sostenibile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — no SCOP equivalent in Chinese standards; re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 required for EU Ecodesign compliance in Italy; ENEA Conto Termico 2.0 and Ecobonus impose additional Italy-specific SCOP thresholds for incentive eligibility with no Chinese equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国标准中无等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新测试以满足意大利欧盟生态设计合规要求；ENEA的Conto Termico 2.0和Ecobonus规定了额外的意大利特定SCOP激励资格门槛，中国无等效要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國標準中無等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新測試以滿足義大利歐盟生態設計合規要求；ENEA的Conto Termico 2.0和Ecobonus規定了額外的義大利特定SCOP激勵資格門檻，中國無等效要求。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Heat Pumps (Regulation (EU) No 811/2013) and ARERA Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——热泵（欧盟法规第811/2013号）与ARERA电网接入
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——熱泵（歐盟法規第811/2013號）與ARERA電網接入

summary.en: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 811/2013 (delegated act under Regulation 2017/1369) requires an A+++ to G energy efficiency scale for space heaters sold in Italy as across the EU. Heat pumps must display a seasonal efficiency class on a mandatory EU energy label and product fiche. Italy's grid is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz. ARERA (Autorità di Regolazione per Energia Reti e Ambiente) regulates the electricity market and grid connection standards; heat pumps with significant power draw (typically above 3.68 kW single-phase or three-phase systems) require grid-operator connection approval under ARERA's connection rules (Delibera ARG/elt 99/08 and subsequent updates). ENEA manages the national energy-label database (EPREL for EU products).
summary.zh: 能效标签法规（EU）811/2013（依据法规2017/1369的授权法案）要求意大利与整个欧盟销售的供暖设备采用A+++至G能效等级。热泵须在产品及产品信息单上粘贴强制性欧盟能效标签，显示季节性效率等级。意大利电网为230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz。ARERA（能源、网络与环境监管局）监管电力市场和电网接入标准；功率需求较大的热泵（通常超过3.68 kW单相或三相系统）须依据ARERA电网接入规定（ARG/elt 99/08决议及后续更新）取得电网运营商接入批准。ENEA管理全国能效标签数据库（EPREL，适用于欧盟产品）。
summary.zht: 能效標籤法規（EU）811/2013（依據法規2017/1369的授權法案）要求義大利與整個歐盟銷售的供暖設備採用A+++至G能效等級。熱泵須在產品及產品資訊單上粘貼強制性歐盟能效標籤，顯示季節性效率等級。義大利電網為230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz。ARERA（能源、網絡與環境監管局）監管電力市場和電網接入標準；功率需求較大的熱泵（通常超過3.68 kW單相或三相系統）須依據ARERA電網接入規定（ARG/elt 99/08決議及後續更新）取得電網運營商接入批准。ENEA管理全國能效標籤數據庫（EPREL，適用於歐盟產品）。

standards_or_laws: ARERA (electricity market and grid connection — Italy)

summary.en: China's energy efficiency labelling is governed by the GB 12021 series and the MIIT/SAMR energy label scheme. The Chinese label format, efficiency tier definitions, and rating methodology differ from the EU energy label. Chinese energy labels are not recognised in Italy or the EU. China's grid (220/380 V, 50 Hz) differs from Italy's (230/400 V, 50 Hz); Chinese products designed for the domestic grid may require electrical re-validation for Italian grid conditions.
summary.zh: 中国能效标签由GB 12021系列及工信部/市监总局能效标识制度管理。中国标签格式、效率等级定义及评级方法与欧盟能效标签不同。中国能效标识在意大利或欧盟均不被认可。中国电网（220/380 V，50 Hz）与意大利（230/400 V，50 Hz）不同；为中国本土电网设计的产品可能需要针对意大利电网条件重新进行电气验证。
summary.zht: 中國能效標籤由GB 12021系列及工信部/市監總局能效標識制度管理。中國標籤格式、效率等級定義及評級方法與歐盟能效標籤不同。中國能效標識在義大利或歐盟均不被認可。中國電網（220/380 V，50 Hz）與義大利（230/400 V，50 Hz）不同；為中國本土電網設計的產品可能需要針對義大利電網條件重新進行電氣驗證。

gap.en: A new EU energy label complying with Regulation (EU) 811/2013 is required for sale in Italy. Seasonal efficiency must be re-calculated using EN 14825. The product must be registered in EPREL (EU product database). Chinese energy label data cannot be directly transposed. Italian grid voltage (230/400 V) differs from Chinese nominal (220/380 V); Chinese units must be validated for Italian grid conditions. Large heat pumps may require ARERA grid-connection approval from the Italian distribution system operator.
gap.zh: 在意大利销售需要符合欧盟法规811/2013的新欧盟能效标签。季节性效率须按EN 14825方法重新计算。产品须在EPREL（欧盟产品数据库）登记。中国能效标签数据不能直接转换使用。意大利电网电压（230/400 V）与中国标称（220/380 V）不同；中国机组须针对意大利电网条件进行验证。大型热泵可能需要获得意大利配电系统运营商的ARERA电网接入批准。
gap.zht: 在義大利銷售需要符合歐盟法規811/2013的新歐盟能效標籤。季節性效率須按EN 14825方法重新計算。產品須在EPREL（歐盟產品數據庫）登記。中國能效標籤數據不能直接轉換使用。義大利電網電壓（230/400 V）與中國標稱（220/380 V）不同；中國機組須針對義大利電網條件進行驗證。大型熱泵可能需要獲得義大利配電系統運營商的ARERA電網接入批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU energy label and EPREL registration required; ARERA grid-connection approval mandatory for large units; D.Lgs. 192/2005 building energy compliance mandatory)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese energy label under GB 12021 series)

source.publisher: ARERA — Autorità di Regolazione per Energia Reti e Ambiente

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — new EU energy label and EPREL registration required for Italy; Chinese label not accepted; seasonal efficiency must be recalculated to EN 14825; Italian grid voltage (230/400 V) differs from Chinese nominal; large units may require ARERA grid-connection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——意大利需要新的欧盟能效标签并须完成EPREL登记；中国标签不被接受；季节性效率须按EN 14825重新计算；意大利电网电压（230/400 V）与中国标称不同；大型机组可能需要取得ARERA电网接入批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——義大利需要新的歐盟能效標籤並須完成EPREL登記；中國標籤不被接受；季節性效率須按EN 14825重新計算；義大利電網電壓（230/400 V）與中國標稱不同；大型機組可能需要取得ARERA電網接入批准。
